metadata.notes: Visa summaries are structured from official immigration guidance for planning only. Users must verify requirements, documents, and processing with Hi Korea or the relevant Korean diplomatic mission before applying.

description: Permanent residence status for applicants who meet long-term residence and eligibility requirements.
eligibility: Meet the relevant F-5 category requirements
Long-term residence, income, integration, or family criteria where applicable
Clean legal and immigration record requirements
documents: Integration or eligibility documents by category
processing_time: Varies by immigration office and applicant circumstances; confirm officially.
renewal: Permanent residence management requirements still apply; confirm reporting and card renewal rules officially.
notes: Long-term goal rather than an immediate entry visa. Requirements are detailed and should be confirmed with official guidance.
